results.standalone_conformance: 4/4 fixture trials passed with filesystem and SHA-256 artifact verification
results.durability: content-based repository snapshot and event-log recovery regressions passed
results.security: tracked-episode redaction and completion-gate regressions passed

runs.limits: No real-model bare/previous/candidate behavior trials were run. Standalone conformance used a deterministic fixture adapter. The strict external Agent Skills validator passed v0.2.1; v0.2.2 uses the same validated frontmatter shape but still requires a fresh external-validator run before release publication.

results.run_provenance: self-digested manifest binds Skill, adapter runtime, dataset, cases, model/host profile, trials, limits, and explicit environment names
results.runtime_isolation: deny-by-default adapter environment, bounded stdin/stdout/stderr, timeout, and process-group cleanup regressions passed
results.independent_review: source digest verification, producer/grader digest separation, immutable source grading, and reviewed-case regressions passed
results.paired_comparison: compatibility rejection, independent-review consumption, Wilson interval, pass@k, pass^k, and paired-delta regressions passed
results.provider_adapters: Codex and Claude Code command isolation, project-local Skill materialization, instrumented Skill trace, and locally derived artifact hash regressions passed against fake CLIs
results.suite_validation: 18 trigger, 11 behavior, 10 public regression, and 4 standalone cases validated

runs.limits: No real Codex, GPT-5.6-sol, Claude Code, or Claude Fable 5 model call was run. Provider adapters were exercised only against deterministic fake CLIs. No proposer-blind held-out suite, authentication/network path, or real-model bare/previous/candidate quality result is claimed. A fresh external Agent Skills validator run is still required before release publication.
